## Image Generation Prompt Modifier

> This paragraph is prepended to every image generation prompt. It encodes the brand's visual identity, platform context, and aesthetic guardrails in a single dense block. Update it whenever brand guidelines change or ad performance data suggests a visual direction shift.

[GENERATED — 50-75 word paragraph. Example structure:
"[Tone adjective] [industry] advertisement with [layout description]. Brand colors: [primary] with [secondary] accent.

Negative: [what to avoid]."]
